title: Navigate to credit cards section and view card list
description: User can navigate to the products section of the site and view a list of available products

title: Use filters to refine credit card results
description: User can use filters (e.g., rewards, travel, cashback) to refine results

title: Click a credit card to view details including benefits fees and rewards
description: User can click on a credit card to view details (benefits, fees, rewards)

title: View card highlights and comparison without logging in
description: User can see clear card comparison or highlights without logging in

title: Relevant results based on selected filters
description: User receives relevant results based on selected filters or search criteria
